metadata.description: The Purely Personal AI C-Suite plugin · 5 engines (Marketing, Sales, Operations, Cash, Leadership) + 38 frameworks + BUSINESS-BRAIN.md as the context layer

plugins.name: purely-personal
plugins.description: An AI C-Suite for solopreneurs. 8 slash commands wired to BUSINESS-BRAIN.md and 38 operator-grade frameworks. Marketing, Sales, Operations, Cash, and Leadership engines that read your business context and ship real work in minutes.

plugins.name: ai-employee-bootcamp
plugins.description: Your complete AI employee team. One brain. Five executives. 22 skills across marketing, sales, operations, finance, content, outreach, and skill customisation, running on a schedule while you sleep. Reads your foundation documents from your Business Brain folder or GitHub repo. CMO drafts today's post in your voice using Variation A (Framework-Heavy) or Variation B (Story-Flow). CRO builds 10 qualified prospects with personalised DM sequences powered by the Sell-by-Chat playbook. COO briefs your morning. CFO reports your revenue. Matchmaker audits your skills against your documents. Tailor fits every skill to your exact ICP, voice, and offer. Every output branded HTML in your colors. by Daniel Paul · Purely Personal.
